text:
Once upon a time in the quiet village of Willowbrook, there lived a quirky old bookseller named Mr. Bloom. Despite his age, Mr. Bloom possessed an endless collection of vintage novels. Every nook and cranny of his shop was adorned with bookplates, bookmarks, and faded titles.

One particularly vibrant day, a young girl named Lucy drifted into Bloom’s. She carried nothing but a brown paper bag and a hopeful glimmer in her eyes. Mr. Bloom welcomed her with open arms, his whiskers tickling her chin.

“Ah, what an exquisite day for a new discovery,” he chuckled. "What’ve you got there?”

The girl opened the bag, revealing a weathered volume entitled, 'The Whispering Woods.' Intrigued by the mystical title and the faint smell of age, Lucy took it home.

Over the weeks, Lucy found that every night after dark, she could hear the story of 'The Whispering Woods' spoken aloud. She thought nobody else
